business.name: Cepeda Creative Decor
business.tagline: Custom Carpentry That Transforms Your Dallas Home
business.hours: Mon-Fri: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat: 9:00 AM - 3:00 PM

seo.title: Cepeda Creative Decor | Expert Carpenter in Dallas, TX | Custom Woodwork
seo.description: Cepeda Creative Decor offers professional carpentry services in Dallas, TX. From custom furniture to kitchen cabinets, we bring your vision to life. Call (972) 922-4991 for a free quote.

hero.headline: Bringing Your Woodworking Dreams to Life
hero.subheadline: Custom furniture, cabinetry, and home renovations crafted with precision and care. Serving Dallas homeowners and businesses since 2010.

featureSections.title: One-of-a-Kind Pieces for Your Home
featureSections.body: From rustic farmhouse tables to modern shelving, we design and build furniture that fits your style and space perfectly. Every piece is handcrafted using premium materials.
bullets: Bespoke designs tailored to your preferences
Solid wood and eco-friendly options available
Built to last with expert joinery
featureSections.cardBody: A 10-seat live-edge walnut table crafted for a family in Lakewood. Features hand-carved legs and a durable satin finish.

featureSections.title: Transform Your Space with Custom Cabinetry
featureSections.body: Your kitchen and bathroom deserve the best. We build custom cabinets that maximize storage and elevate the look of your home. From design to installation, we handle it all.
featureSections.cardBody: Shaker-style cabinets with quartz countertops and under-cabinet lighting. Completed in just 3 weeks in a Preston Hollow home.

whyChooseUs.title: Custom Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every project is designed and built specifically for you. No cookie-cutter solutions—just unique woodwork that reflects your taste.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We source the finest hardwoods, plywoods, and finishes to ensure durability and beauty. Your investment lasts for decades.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & On Time
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your schedule. Our team completes projects on time and within budget, with clear communication every step of the way.

whyChooseUs.title: Full-Service Experience
whyChooseUs.description: From initial consultation to final installation, we handle everything. You get a single point of contact and a stress-free process.

testimonials.quote: Cepeda Creative built a custom bookshelf for our living room. The craftsmanship is incredible—it looks like it's always been part of the house. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We hired them for a full kitchen remodel. The cabinets are gorgeous and the team was professional, punctual, and tidy. Couldn't be happier.
testimonials.author: James R.

testimonials.quote: I needed a unique desk for my home office. They listened to my ideas and created something even better than I imagined. Fair pricing too.
testimonials.author: Emily T.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free consultation and quote. Let's create something beautiful together.

servicesPage.intro: At Cepeda Creative Decor, we offer a full range of carpentry services for homes and businesses in Dallas. Whether you need custom furniture, kitchen cabinets, or outdoor structures, our skilled team delivers exceptional quality and design. Explore our services below.

services.title: Custom Furniture
services.shortDescription: Handcrafted tables, chairs, beds, and more—designed to your exact specifications.
services.longDescription: Our custom furniture service brings your vision to life. From elegant dining tables to functional bookshelves, we use traditional joinery and modern techniques to create pieces that are both beautiful and durable. Every project starts with a consultation to understand your style, space, and needs.
benefits: Unique designs that match your decor
Built to last with heirloom-quality craftsmanship

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We meet with you to discuss your ideas, measure your space, and recommend materials and designs.

process.title: Design & Approval
process.description: We create detailed drawings and a 3D model for your approval before any wood is cut.

process.title: Build & Delivery
process.description: Our craftsmen build your piece in our workshop, then deliver and install it in your home.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom piece of furniture?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by complexity, but most pieces are completed within 2-4 weeks. We'll provide a specific timeline during the consultation.

faqs.question: What types of wood do you use?
faqs.answer: We work with a variety of hardwoods including oak, walnut, maple, cherry, and more. We also offer reclaimed and eco-friendly options.

services.title: Kitchen & Bath Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Custom cabinets that maximize storage and elevate your kitchen or bathroom.
services.longDescription: Transform your kitchen or bathroom with custom cabinetry from Cepeda Creative. We design and build cabinets that fit your space perfectly, offering endless options for style, finish, and storage solutions. Our team handles everything from demolition to installation, ensuring a seamless renovation experience.
benefits: Fully customized to your layout and style
Maximized storage with pull-outs and organizers
Professional installation by our experienced team

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We visit your home to take precise measurements and discuss your storage needs, style preferences, and budget.

process.title: Cabinet Fabrication
process.description: Using your approved design, we build your cabinets in our workshop with meticulous attention to detail.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: Our crew installs the cabinets, ensures perfect alignment, and applies any final touches for a flawless result.

faqs.question: Do you offer cabinet refacing or just new construction?
faqs.answer: We specialize in new custom cabinets, but we can also reface existing cabinets if the structure is sound. Contact us to discuss your options.

faqs.question: How much do custom cabinets cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary based on size, materials, and complexity. We provide a detailed quote after the initial consultation, with no hidden fees.

services.title: Outdoor Structures
services.shortDescription: Custom decks, pergolas, and gazebos built to enhance your outdoor living space.
services.longDescription: Extend your living space outdoors with custom-built structures from Cepeda Creative. Whether you want a relaxing pergola, a spacious deck, or a charming gazebo, we design and construct durable, weather-resistant features that complement your home and landscape.
benefits: Custom designs that suit your yard and lifestyle
Durable materials built for Texas weather
Increased home value and curb appeal

process.title: Site Evaluation
process.description: We assess your outdoor space, check for any grading or utility issues, and discuss your vision.

process.title: Design & Permitting
process.description: We create a plan and handle any necessary permits so you don't have to worry about regulations.

process.title: Construction & Cleanup
process.description: Our team builds your structure efficiently, with minimal disruption to your yard, and cleans up thoroughly.

faqs.question: Do you build structures that can withstand Dallas storms?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use pressure-treated lumber and secure construction methods to ensure your structure is safe and durable.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a deck?
faqs.answer: Most decks are completed within 1-2 weeks, depending on size and complexity. We'll provide a timeline upfront.

services.title: Trim & Crown Molding
services.shortDescription: Elegant trim work that adds character and value to any room.
services.longDescription: Add architectural interest to your home with custom trim and crown molding. Our skilled carpenters install baseboards, chair rails, wainscoting, and crown molding with precision. We match existing styles or create new profiles to enhance your interior design.
benefits: Wide variety of profiles and wood species
Can match historic or modern styles
Increases home value and aesthetic appeal

process.title: Measurement & Material Selection
process.description: We measure your rooms and help you choose molding profiles and wood types that fit your budget and style.

process.title: Custom Milling
process.description: We mill the molding to your exact specifications, ensuring perfect fit and finish.

process.title: Installation & Touch-Up
process.description: Our team installs the trim with precision, fills nail holes, and applies caulk for a polished look.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim in my home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can replicate existing profiles or create a complementary design that blends seamlessly.

faqs.question: Do you paint or stain the trim?
faqs.answer: We can install trim primed and ready for paint, or we can apply a finish coat if desired. Let us know your preference.

about.headline: Dallas's Premier Custom Carpentry Team
about.mission: Our mission is to transform spaces through exceptional woodwork, combining traditional craftsmanship with modern design to create pieces that enrich our clients' lives.
story: Cepeda Creative Decor was founded in 2010 by master carpenter Juan Cepeda, who started his career building furniture in his garage. With a passion for woodworking and an eye for detail, Juan quickly built a reputation for quality and reliability. Over the years, he assembled a team of skilled artisans who share his commitment to excellence.

Today, we serve homeowners and businesses across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex. Every project, from a simple shelf to a complete kitchen renovation, receives the same dedication and care. We believe in building relationships as strong as the furniture we create, and we're proud to be a trusted name in Dallas carpentry.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work, using time-honored techniques and the finest materials to deliver exceptional results.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We communicate honestly, provide accurate quotes, and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.description: We blend traditional woodworking with modern design and technology to create pieces that are both functional and beautiful.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local businesses and artisans, and we're committed to making Dallas a more beautiful place, one project at a time.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to discuss your project? Call us or fill out the form below for a free consultation and quote.
